title: Moroccan Vegetable Tagine
description: A hearty and flavorful Moroccan stew made with aromatic spices and tender vegetables. This recipe is perfect for a chilly evening.

ingredients.name: Moroccan Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: available at most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: Heat the oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the Moroccan spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the firm seffa and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until lightly browned.
Add the fragrant vegetable and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the fried seffa, salt, and pepper to taste. Continue to cook for 10-15 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
